title: Crunchy British Butter Wrap
description: A buttery, tender post-workout dish featuring sugars, fry-friendly for pescatarian diets.

ingredients.name: Sugars (optional)
ingredients.notes: for sweetness, reduce if using maple syrup or honey instead

instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Gently spread the butter in the pan until melted and slightly foamy.
Add sugars to the pan if using, stirring occasionally for about 1 minute or until lightly caramelized.
Place pasta sheet into the pan with warm butter mixture. Cook for approximately 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
